message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "user" as User
rectangle "Wrapper" as Wrapper
rectangle "wrapped" as Wrapped

User -> Wrapper: 1 predict(X)
activate Wrapper
Wrapper -> Wrapper: 2 validate; strip
Wrapper -> Wrapped: 3 predict(Xt)
activate Wrapped
Wrapped --> Wrapper: 4 yt
deactivate Wrapped
Wrapper -> Wrapper: 5 add metadata
Wrapper --> User: 6 y
deactivate Wrapper

@enduml
```
